option.name: originalContent
option.value:
• About
  • Stack
  • Projects
  • Contact

Welcome to My Portfolio

I'm a Software developer

About Me

Hello! My name is Vladyslav, and I am a student at TUKE University who is actively developing in the field of programming. Although I do not yet have commercial experience, I have already completed several interesting academic projects that helped me gain practical skills and learn to work in a team.

My main tools are JavaScript, C, Java, and C#. I am constantly improving my knowledge because I strive to create products I can be proud of. I am motivated by seeing real results from my work and growing together with modern technologies.

Besides programming, I am passionate about sports: I used to do kayaking professionally, but now I enjoy volleyball, mountain biking, and hiking. I am fluent in Ukrainian, speak English at a B2 level, and Slovak at a B1-B2 level.

My Tech Stack

I work mostly with:

  • JavaScript
  • C
  • Java
  • C#
  • HTML / CSS
  • Node.js (basic backend)

My Projects

Project 1

Description of project 1.

Project 2

Description of project 2.

Contact Me

Email: canoingpro@gmail.com

LinkedIn: My LinkedIn

© 2026 Vladyslav. All rights reserved.

option.name: updatedContent

I'm a Software developer

About Me

Hello! My name is Vladyslav, and I am a student at TUKE University who is actively developing in the field of programming. Although I do not yet have commercial experience, I have already completed several interesting academic projects that helped me gain practical skills and learn to work in a team.

My main tools are JavaScript, C, Java, and C#. I am constantly improving my knowledge because I strive to create products I can be proud of. I am motivated by seeing real results from my work and growing together with modern technologies.

Besides programming, I am passionate about sports: I used to do kayaking professionally, but now I enjoy volleyball, mountain biking, and hiking. I am fluent in Ukrainian, speak English at a B2 level, and Slovak at a B1-B2 level.
